product_description: Book Creator is an intuitive EdTech platform designed to empower students and teachers to create and publish interactive digital books incorporating text, images, audio, and video. It supports diverse learning styles and encourages creative expression, making learning accessible and engaging for all users.

ai_insights: Book Creator demonstrates a strong commitment to accessibility, guided by Universal Design for Learning principles. The platform offers robust accessible authoring tools, including AI-generated alt text, speech-to-text in numerous languages, customizable fonts, and high-contrast color options. Compliance with WCAG 2.2 Level AA, EN 301 549, and Revised Section 508 is affirmed through its Accessibility Conformance Report, updated in March 2026. Proactive testing with various assistive technologies ensures broad compatibility, and the platform provides practical guidance for users to create inclusive digital content. Educational institutions recognize Book Creator as a valuable "Accessible Content Creator," integrating features like text-to-speech, voice recording, and translation to support diverse learning needs. While the platform offers robust accessibility, the ultimate accessibility of individual books depends on author adherence to accessible design practices, reinforcing its dedication to inclusive design and ongoing improvements.

acr_reports.title: Accessibility Conformance Report
acr_reports.version: Aligns with WCAG 2.2 Level AA, EN 301 549, and Revised Section 508
